title: Tom Davies (footballer, born 1998)
extract:
Thomas Davies (born 30 June 1998) is an English professional footballer who plays as a midfielder.
He is a former England national under-21 team player. Davies is an academy graduate of Everton and made his first-team debut in April 2016 at the age of 17. Two years later, he became the youngest player to captain the side, doing so at the age of 20 years and 60 days.
